name: In Love with the Helplessly Romantic CEO
original_name: 谁懂啊，霍总是个恋爱脑
overview:
Seven years ago, during her engagement party, He Zi Ning unexpectedly had a one-night encounter with Huo Yan Shen.

Seven years later, He Zi Ning returns to the same hotel for work. By coincidence, her young son He Chen Xi becomes the bridge that connects her once again with Huo Yan Shen.

He carries a long-standing promise to the mysterious girl from seven years ago, while she searches for the man from that night to save her child’s illness. By a twist of fate, they finally discover — the person standing before them is the one they’ve both been searching for in their hearts all along.

trailers.title: 【Full】I ended up sleeping with another man! I never imagined this was a trap set up by my husband!
渣男大婚之夜，灰姑娘卻穿著婚紗，在大街上赤腳奔襲，還偶遇了被下藥的總裁！一場迷幻，糾葛的愛戀，到底該如何展開！《忍罪逃妻 總裁偏要霸道寵》QRDJ
